content_markdown:
phase: "75"
title: "Degraded Mode Enforcement"
enforcement_area: "Model-Facing Memory Truth Closure"
updated_at: "2026-03-28T05:56:00Z"
closure_rule: "No requirement-level truth may close while any phase-level truth artifact for the same enforcement area remains non-VALID."
artifacts:
  verification: ".planning/phases/75-degraded-mode-enforcement/75-VERIFICATION.md"
  truth: ".planning/phases/75-degraded-mode-enforcement/75-TRUTH.yaml"
invariants:
  - name: "memory_blocking"
    affects_truth: true
    description: "Model-facing memory must fail closed when canonical Postgres-backed trusted memory is unavailable."
    expected_outcome: "VALID"
    evidence_surfaces:
      - "tests/brain-mcp-degraded-mode.test.cjs"
      - "tests/second-brain-status.test.cjs"
      - "tests/brain-health.test.cjs"
      - "node get-stuff-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs brain health --raw"
      - "node get-stuff-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs brain status --raw"
  - name: "planning_memory_blocking"
    affects_truth: true
    description: "Authoritative planning workflows must block model-facing memory use explicitly when canonical trusted memory is unavailable."
    expected_outcome: "VALID"
    evidence_surfaces:
      - "node get-stuff-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs context build --workflow plan-phase --raw"
      - "node get-stuff-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs context build --workflow execute-plan --raw"
      - ".planning/health/latest-degraded-state.json"
  - name: "degraded_state_signaling"
    affects_truth: true
    description: "Degraded state must be surfaced explicitly and machine-readably for the same memory-truth enforcement area."
    expected_outcome: "VALID"
    evidence_surfaces:
      - ".planning/health/latest-degraded-state.json"
      - "node get-stuff-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs brain health --raw"
      - "node get-stuff-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs brain status --raw"
  - name: "drift_input_validity"
    affects_truth: true
    description: "Any drift input consumed by Phase 75 truth for this enforcement area must be present, fresh, and machine-readable."
    expected_outcome: "VALID"
    evidence_surfaces:
      - ".planning/drift/latest-report.json"
      - ".planning/drift/latest-reconciliation.json"
      - "node get-stuff-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs brain health --raw"
  - name: "verification_integrity"
    affects_truth: true
    description: "Verification must remain evidence-first and must not preserve a conditional verdict for this enforcement area once the same-area invariants are satisfied."
    expected_outcome: "VALID"
    evidence_surfaces:
      - ".planning/phases/75-degraded-mode-enforcement/75-VERIFICATION.md"
      - "node get-stuff-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs verify verification-artifact .planning/phases/75-degraded-mode-enforcement/75-VERIFICATION.md"
